Subject: Urgent Appeal: Support Democratic Movement in Iran
Body:
Dear {{RepresentativeFullName}},

As your constituent from {{RidingOrRegion}} ({{PostalCode}}), I am reaching out to request your immediate attention to the grave human rights crisis unfolding in Iran. The Iranian regime's systematic violence against its own people—including mass executions, torture, and digital suppression—demands a decisive Canadian response that reflects our nation's commitment to democracy and human dignity.

The historic gathering of over 350,000 Iranians in Toronto demonstrated an overwhelming call for action from our elected representatives. As a member of the Iranian-Canadian community, I want to emphasize that your position on this critical issue will be a determining factor in how we assess our federal representation moving forward.

The Liberal Party has historically championed progressive internationalism and multilateral human rights advocacy. I urge you to leverage your influence within {{RidingOrRegion}} and the broader caucus to champion the following concrete actions:

1. Publicly stand with Iran's democratic movement
Affirm Canada's unwavering support for the Iranian people's quest for freedom and self-determination.

2. Condemn state-sponsored terrorism
Denounce the massacres orchestrated by the IRGC and the regime's systematic violence against peaceful demonstrators.

3. Strengthen domestic security measures
Advocate for rigorous investigation and legal action against IRGC operatives and regime officials residing in Canada.

4. Implement comprehensive asset seizures
Push for immediate identification and confiscation of regime-linked assets, redirecting these resources to humanitarian aid and democratic opposition movements.

5. Ensure digital freedom for Iranians
Champion initiatives that provide Iranians with tools to bypass government-imposed internet restrictions.

6. Advocate for prisoner releases
Work with international partners to secure the freedom of all political detainees held by the Iranian regime.

7. Support transitional democracy planning
Urge government engagement with legitimate opposition leader, Prince Reza Pahlavi, including extending a parliamentary invitation to address Canada's commitment to Iran's democratic future.

This moment requires more than diplomatic statements—it demands tangible action that demonstrates Canada's values on the world stage. I trust you will champion these measures with the urgency they deserve.

Thank you for your attention to this pressing matter.

Respectfully,
{{UserName}}
{{PhoneNumber}}
